query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "self-distilled agentic reinforcement learning" computer science
rationale: The paper is a general survey on natural language state representations in Reinforcement Learning and does not address the specific mechanisms of "Self-Distilled Agentic Reinforcement Learning," "LLMXive," or the specific follow-up context requested by the user. It fails to meet criteria (a) or (b) as it does not measure the same biological/algorithmic mechanism or variables, and it is not the foundational methodology (d) for the specific "Self-Distilled Agentic" framework mentioned.
